narrative:
Precinct Dover 2-C (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 970 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 5.5 percentage points.
